extensionDescription.message: Protect your eye health by filtering blue light.

presetGalaxyWhiteDesc.message: Good for general browsing/high contrast needs

presetWarmOrangeDesc.message: Good for night reading/reducing blue light

optionsHeader.description: Main header on the options page.

aboutText1.message: This software aims to provide users with an intelligent eye care assistant, helping to reduce fatigue caused by prolonged screen time. It is particularly suitable for opening various documents, PDF files, and e-books in eye-protection mode. Core features include...

aboutText2.message: 1. Eye Protection Mode: Activates optimal eye conditions (preset work modes, time periods, etc.) to convert the screen into an eye-friendly mode, offering adjustments for mode, color, and brightness to protect vision.

aboutText3.message: 2. PDF Reader Integration: Users can directly access PDF files seamlessly connected to their work content within the workspace. The interface adapts automatically, improving the experience with content-based filtering, suggestions, and overall responsiveness, finally allowing direct operations within different files.

aboutText4.message: By reasonably arranging work and rest times, it helps reduce eye fatigue, improving work efficiency and quality of life. Freely adjust various color parameters for quick application, creating comfortable multi-mode options.

feature1.message: Multiple preset eye protection modes, one-click switch.

feature2.message: Supports custom background and text colors.

feature3.message: Save frequently used settings as custom modes.

usageTitle.description: Title for the 'How to Use' section.

usageStep1.message: 1. Click the extension icon in the browser toolbar to open the control panel.

usageStep2.message: 2. In the control panel, you can enable or disable the eye protection mode.

usageStep3.message: 3. Select a preset mode or customize the background and text colors using the color pickers.

usageStep4.message: 4. You can save your preferred settings as a custom mode for quick access.

usageStep5.message: 5. Switch the interface language using the dropdown menu in the top right corner.

footerText.message: Thanks for using Eye Care Assistant!
footerText.description: Footer text on the options page.

optionsButtonTooltip.description: Tooltip for the settings button in the popup.

customModeSaveBtn.description: Text for the save button in the modal.

feedbackText.message: We value your feedback greatly. Please contact us with any suggestions or issues via:
feedbackText.description: Introductory text for the Feedback section.

feedbackEmailLabel.description: Label for the feedback email address.

siteTipDescGoogle.message: Google has its own dark theme. If pages stay dark after disabling the extension, set Appearance to Light or Follow device theme.

siteTipDescYouTube.message: YouTube uses its own theme. If it stays dark after disabling, change Appearance to Light in the avatar menu.
